pi_items.source: task.json, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh confirm this is the target output directory.
task.json description and export_result.sh explicitly expect these files.
verifier.py checks if the estimated slope is <= -0.02. R linear mixed model confirmed the empirical slope is approx -0.08.
verifier.py checks if the estimated slope is >= -0.15. R linear mixed model confirmed the empirical slope is approx -0.08.
verifier.py explicitly checks if max_rhat < 1.15, though 1.10 is claimed in metadata.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for rstudio_env bayesian_pk_theophylline task by verifying that the data is the real built-in R dataset Theoph. Confirmed via an R script that the empirical elimination rate constant (slope) is approximately -0.08, falling squarely within the [-0.15, -0.02] verifier constraints. Noted a minor discrepancy where the metadata claims an rhat_max of 1.10, but verifier.py checks against 1.15.
